HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RANDY CAMPBELL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. RANDY CAMPBELL HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, RANDY

MATTER DID NOT SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI, CLERK: DLOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RANDY CAMPBELL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. RANDY CAMPBELL HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF RANDY CAMPBELL ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Benjamin Holl, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Vyaky Gamble, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Jon Berkley Management, Inc.
Paul Arshawsky representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Randy Campbell is present.
Susan Petro representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of August 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. remains as set.
